text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The exact title "Biotalk: Enzyme function prediction with natural language supervision" was not found on any dedicated paper page in web search results or academic databases. The arXiv ID 2404.02285 points to an entirely different paper ("LP++: A Surprisingly Strong Linear Probe for Few-Shot CLIP"), and the cited authors (Hoarfrost, Smith, Xu, Wang) do not match. A related "BioTalk" dataset project exists (hosted at hoarfrost-lab.github.io/BioTalk), but its actual paper has a different title and different authors, confirming this reference is fabricated.
LINK: NONE
